rulings.Case Title: JAY B. BARNES et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery From Plaintiff Jay B. Barnes And Request For Sanctions; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, September 5, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Eaton Corp.¿s motion to compel responses to written discovery from Jay Barnes and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
